blended.narrative: Mission Ridge is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 12".
